summary: Iteration 35 - Multi-Property Outlet Management Tests PASSED. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin & Onboarding panel opens with 5 tabs (Outlets, Users, GL Codes, Properties, Settings), Settings tab shows Multi-Property toggle (ENABLED), Properties tab shows 7 property cards with outlet badges, Property Picker visible in sidebar with dropdown showing 'All Properties' and individual properties, Create Property form works with outlet assignment chips.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-property feature fully implemented with proper backend CRUD operations
Settings endpoint correctly returns and updates multi_property_enabled toggle
Properties endpoint enriches response with outlet_names and outlet_count
Cross-property dashboard correctly returns enabled=False when multi-property disabled
Property Picker in sidebar fetches from /api/admin/settings and /api/admin/properties on mount
Admin panel has all 5 tabs with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Note: Database has mixed property formats (seed data uses 'id', new properties use 'property_id') - consider normalizing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed properties + TEST_ prefixed properties created during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified Multi-Property Outlet Management feature. Backend: GET/PUT /api/admin/settings (multi_property_enabled toggle), CRUD /api/admin/properties, GET /api/admin/properties/{id}/summary, GET /api/admin/cross-property-dashboard all working. Frontend: Admin panel has 5 tabs (Outlets, Users, GL Codes, Properties, Settings), Settings tab has Multi-Property toggle (currently ENABLED), Properties tab shows property cards with outlet badges, Property Picker in sidebar shows dropdown with 'All Properties' and individual properties. Note: Database has mixed property ID formats ('id' vs 'property_id') from seed vs new data.

properties_crud.create_property: PASS - creates with name, code, address, outlet_ids
